dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I have been planning something ambitious. {quest_focus_The} may hold something extraordinary, and I finally have a plan to reach it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: No one has dared to {quest_action} because of {quest_threat_the}. The {enemy_type_plural} have occupied the approach {location_hint} and killed every scout we sent. I need someone who can fight through them and open the way.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we succeed, we could change the fortunes of this entire settlement. Others went in blind: we will not make the same mistake.

dialogueChunks.intro: I have spent years researching this, {player_name}. {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been sealed for generations, and I finally know how to get inside.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The trick is to {quest_action} without drawing the full attention of {quest_threat_the}. But the outer defenses are crawling with {enemy_type_plural} {location_hint}. Someone needs to clear a path before we can even attempt an approach.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} locked away in there could reshape what we know about this land. And of course, there would be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, our current supply lines are failing. I propose something bold: to {quest_action} through {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The path is treacherous and {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} claimed the area as their own. The {enemy_type_plural} have dug in {location_hint} and they need to be driven out before anyone can pass safely.
dialogueChunks.outro: {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} depending on this. We must act before {quest_time_pressure}, or we lose our window entirely.

dialogueChunks.intro: Everyone told me this was impossible, {player_name}. That {quest_focus_the} could never be reached. I intend to prove them wrong.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The reason nobody has tried since {quest_origin} is the {enemy_type_plural}. They patrol the area {location_hint} in numbers that would turn back any ordinary expedition. But I have studied their movements. There are gaps in their patrols: if you strike fast and hard, you can thin the herd before they coordinate a response.
dialogueChunks.outro: This is the kind of enterprise that makes legends, {player_name}. Kill those {enemy_type_plural} and the path to glory opens wide.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, fortune rewards the bold, and I have found the boldest opportunity this settlement has ever seen.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} lies beyond a stretch of territory that {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_has} turned into a death trap. {quest_ally} mapped the area {location_hint} and confirmed that the {enemy_type_plural} there are the only thing between us and {quest_stakes_the}. No amount of sneaking will work: they need to be killed.
dialogueChunks.outro: Are you the kind of person who sees a challenge and walks toward it? Then deal with those {enemy_type_plural} and earn {quest_reward_hint}.

dialogueChunks.intro: I found something in old records, {player_name}. A reference to {quest_focus_the} that everyone else dismissed as myth. I do not think it is.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The coordinates match a location {location_hint} that has been avoided since {quest_origin} because of the {enemy_type_plural}. They guard the area fiercely, and {quest_ally} says their numbers have been growing. If we want {quest_stakes_the}, someone has to go in fighting.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need you to clear those {enemy_type_plural} out. What we find on the other side could change everything.
